# Malay Mishra — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio site of Malay Mishra, a senior frontend engineer transitioning to fullstack. Live at https://malaymishra.com.

The site is a single-page Next.js app with sections for hero, experience, skills, and contact. Experience and skills data is fetched at build/runtime from a public GitHub data repo and revalidated hourly.

## About
- Name: Malay Mishra
- Role: Senior Frontend Engineer (transitioning to fullstack)
- Currently at: Adeptmind
- Stack focus: React, Next.js, TypeScript, GSAP, Tailwind CSS, Go, Python

## Pages
- [Home](https://malaymishra.com/): main landing page with all sections
- [Hero](https://malaymishra.com/#home): intro
- [Experience](https://malaymishra.com/#about): work history
- [Projects/Skills](https://malaymishra.com/#projects): tech stack and projects
- [Contact](https://malaymishra.com/#contact): contact links

## Data sources
- [Experience JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hi-malay/portfolio-data/refs/heads/main/experience.json): structured experience data
- [Skills JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hi-malay/portfolio-data/refs/heads/main/skills.json): structured skills data
- [Sitemap](https://malaymishra.com/sitemap.xml)

## Related projects
- [code.malaymishra.com](https://code.malaymishra.com/): machine coding challenges (React)
- [thikana.malaymishra.com](https://thikana.malaymishra.com/): AI chat popup demo
- [thikanaa on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/thikanaa): published package

## Tech
Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, GSAP + ScrollTrigger, Lenis smooth scroll, thikanaa (own npm package for AI chat).
